**Legend**:
- **Proved** — rigorous derivation; zero free parameters
- **Supported** — numerical or structural evidence
- **Semi-empirical** — derivation with ≥1 unexplained parameter
- **Open** — no known approach reproduces the result; or conjecture
- Dead Ends (documented failed approaches) are excluded from totals.
